movie.actors: Lea Thompson, Jeffrey Jones, Tim Robbins, Ed Gale
movie.plot: A scientific experiment unknowingly brings extraterrestrial life forms to the Earth through a laser beam. First is the cigar smoking drake Howard from the duck's planet. A few kids try to keep him from the greedy scientists and help him back to his planet. But then a much less friendly being arrives through the beam...
movie.title: Howard the Duck
movie.writer: Steve Gerber (Marvel comics character: Howard the Duck), Willard Huyck, Gloria Katz
